message:
fix: Use rustls instead of native-tls for cross-compilation

The musl and aarch64-linux builds were failing because OpenSSL isn't
available for cross-compilation in GitHub Actions. Using the pure-Rust
rustls TLS implementation resolves this issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ crossterm = "0.29.0"
 regex = "1.12.2"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
 unicode-normalization = "0.1.25"
-reqwest = { version = "0.13.1", default-features = false, features = ["blocking", "json"] }
+reqwest = { version = "0.13.1", default-features = false, features = ["blocking", "json", "rustls"] }
 urlencoding = "2.1.3"
 
 # Semantic search / embeddings
